examples.question:
Based on the premises, which statement can be inferred?
A. Every employee accesses sensitive data.
B. No employee accesses sensitive data.
C. Only some employees accesses sensitive data.
D. The premises do not support any conclusion about accessesing.

Based on the premises, which statement can be inferred?
A. Every researcher collects data.
B. No researcher collects data.
C. Only some researchers collects data.
D. The premises do not support any conclusion about collectsing.

Based on the premises, which statement can be inferred?
A. Every student qualifies for the degree.
B. No student qualifies for the degree.
C. Only some students qualifies for the degree.
D. The premises do not support any conclusion about qualifiesing.

Based on the premises, which statement can be inferred?
A. Every candidate receives an offer.
B. No candidate receives an offer.
C. Only some candidates receives an offer.
D. The premises do not support any conclusion about receivesing.

Based on the premises, which statement can be inferred?
A. Every student meets the graduation requirement.
B. No student meets the graduation requirement.
C. Only some students meets the graduation requirement.
D. The premises do not support any conclusion about meetsing.

examples.question:
Based on the above premises, which conclusion logically follows?
A. No student completes the capstone project
B. If a student completes the capstone project, then the student earns honors
C. Every student completes the capstone project
D. Every student reviews instructor feedback

Based on the above premises, which conclusion logically follows?
A. Every student meets the academic advisor
B. If a student meets the academic advisor, then the student attends lectures
C. No student meets the academic advisor
D. Every student passes the final exam

Based on the above premises, which conclusion logically follows?
A. Every lab member stores samples correctly
B. Every lab member calibrates the equipment
C. If a lab member calibrates the equipment, then the lab member cleans the workstation
D. No lab member calibrates the equipment

Based on the above premises, which conclusion logically follows?
A. Every library patron gets extended loan privileges
B. No library patron reserves a study room
C. Every library patron reserves a study room
D. If a library patron reserves a study room, then the library patron holds a valid card

Based on the above premises, which conclusion logically follows?
A. If a scholarship applicant demonstrates financial need, then the scholarship applicant submits a transcript
B. No scholarship applicant demonstrates financial need
C. Every scholarship applicant demonstrates financial need
D. Every scholarship applicant passes the interview
